title: Red Hat Security Advisory: delve and golang security update
overview:
An update for multiple packages is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: delve and golang security update

An update for multiple packages is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for multiple packages is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
delve-1.25.2-1.el10_1.src.rpm
golang-1.25.3-1.el10_1.src.rpm
delve-1.25.2-1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
delve-debuginfo-1.25.2-1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
delve-debugsource-1.25.2-1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
go-toolset-1.25.3-1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
golang-1.25.3-1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
golang-bin-1.25.3-1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
golang-docs-1.25.3-1.el10_1.noarch.rpm

golang-tests-1.25.3-1.el10_1.noarch.rpm
go-toolset-1.25.3-1.el10_1.s390x.rpm

golang-bin-1.25.3-1.el10_1.s390x.rpm
golang-race-1.25.3-1.el10_1.s390x.rpm
delve-1.25.2-1.el10_1.ppc64le.rpm
delve-debuginfo-1.25.2-1.el10_1.ppc64le.rpm
delve-debugsource-1.25.2-1.el10_1.ppc64le.rpm
go-toolset-1.25.3-1.el10_1.ppc64le.rpm
golang-1.25.3-1.el10_1.ppc64le.rpm
golang-bin-1.25.3-1.el10_1.ppc64le.rpm
golang-race-1.25.3-1.el10_1.ppc64le.rpm
delve-1.25.2-1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
delve-debuginfo-1.25.2-1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
delve-debugsource-1.25.2-1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
go-toolset-1.25.3-1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
golang-1.25.3-1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
golang-bin-1.25.3-1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
golang-race-1.25.3-1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm

CVE-2025-58183: A flaw was found in the archive/tar package in the Go standard library. tar.Reader does not set a maximum size on the number of sparse region data blocks in GNU tar pax 1.0 sparse files. A specially crafted tar archive with a pax header indicating a big number of sparse regions can cause a Go program to try to allocate a large amount of memory, causing an out-of-memory condition and resulting in a denial of service.
